overview: I built a conversational feature intake copilot using Claude that replaces PM request forms with adaptive dialogue.

keyPoints.title: 94% ground truth extraction across 3 stakeholder personas
Two-call split fixed model forgetting to respond conversationally
Two-gate design: copilot optimizes UX, PM owns quality decision
Claude misclassified feature type in 1 of 3 test cases
Conversations handle bad input; pipelines just produce bad output
